itemListElement.reviewBody: My children were bullied but teachers took no actions. Teachers instead ignored it and even did partiality with my daughter. Not suggested

They are just money making guys. Extremely sweet and courteous till admission post that they just turn dumb and try to invent ways to undue charges.

Admin department is pathetic.
Very good ICSC school upto Std XII . Big infrastructure with playground and swimming pool. All teachers are very co operative and caring. Principal Sonali Ma'am is one of the best .

This school is one that makes one feel surrounded by an environment which is conducive to learning and fun. Expansive playground, wide corridors, spacious surrounding is something that is not seen in most city schools now a days. Infrastructure is excellent, teachers and staff are equally caring and responsive towards the students. Importance is given to both areas academics and extra curricular activities for all round development of a child. The faculty in the pre primary and primary classes are excellent. The middle school and secondary faculty is pretty decent. If u want to do well in icse and have a good school life, you can go for this school. The performance of this school in extracurricular activities, the transport facility , the sports environment is absolutely amazing.

My son is a student of class 5 in DPS NewTown School. I would highly recommend this school for its exemplary academic excellence and a very well-rounded and comprehensive exposure to co-curricular activities. All the teachers are really good and dedicated and have been very very approachable. The school is very disciplined and meticulous in terms of notifying the parents well in advance of any information related to the academic calendar including the schedule of the chapters of different subjects to be covered across different parts of the year. This has helped immensely in planning my son's preparation for the different test schedules. We being working parents do not get to dedicate a lot of time to our son's studies but we are really fortunate that the subject teachers, so efficiently and effectively, prepare the students in class, that hardly any further reinforcement is required at home. The environment in class is encouraging and fun and my son simply revolts at the mere idea of skipping school for a day. The school also fosters competitiveness and encourages the students to participate in different national level exams like the Olympiads and also motivates and rewards students with accolades and special privileges like scholar badges and blue blazers for the consistently good performers. Each individual child is nurtured in areas where he is good at and encouraged and assisted in the ones that need improvement. That, to me, as a parent, is the essence of a good and productive education.
I would also like to take this opportunity to thank all the teachers and the school management for putting in a tremendous effort in conducting online classes for the last 2 years. This has greatly helped the students to maintain the continuum in their studies and has been very instrumental in allowing for a smooth transition when the offline setup started this year. I am extremely happy with how the school has shaped my son both in terms of his studies as well as his overall development.  We can see a vast improvement in the way he likes to explore new things and has become far more focused and displays concentration and logical thinking. Sometimes he just amazes us as parents and I would attribute most of that achievement to his excellent teachers and the amazing school that DPS NewTown is.
